title: Meritnation is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Meritnation is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Meritnation, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Subject Matter Expert for our Visakhapatnam operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Meritnation:
Meritnation is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Support students with special educational needs
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Data Analysis

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Meritnation!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
